title: Avena volgensis
taxonomy: Avena volgensis is a species of oat. Avena volgensis is classified in the family Poaceae and the genus Avena. The classification of Avena volgensis also includes the subfamily Pooideae. Avena volgensis is native to the southern and western parts of South America. Its classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis.
